name: adr-009-test-file-split
description: Split Mojo test files exceeding the ADR-009 limit of 10 fn test_ functions per file to prevent heap corruption crashes in Mojo v0.26.1 CI. Use when: (1) a Mojo test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI shows intermittent libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT faults in a test group, (3) implementing ADR-009 compliance for new or existing test files.
